title: Fix broken Add Customer functionality on Home Page

requirements.text: Fix the AddCustomerModal so that submitting a new customer (name, phone, previous credit) successfully calls the backend addCustomer mutation and reflects the new customer in the customer list on the Home Page. The fix must handle both online and offline (queue) paths, ensure the actor is ready before submission, clear form state on success, and close the modal without errors.

quotes: the costumer adding still not working

acceptanceCriteria: Opening the Add Customer modal on the Home Page shows the form fields (name, phone, previous credit).
Submitting the form with valid data successfully creates the customer via the backend actor (or queues it offline).
After successful submission, the modal closes and the new customer appears in the customer list.
Form validation prevents submission with empty required fields and shows appropriate error messages.
If the actor is not yet ready, the modal shows a meaningful loading/error state rather than silently failing.
Offline submissions are queued and synced when connectivity is restored.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor.
nonGoals: Adding new customer fields beyond name, phone, and previous credit.
Changes to the PWA install banner or download functionality.
Modifications to transaction or credit payment flows.
